name: Ambusher
description: Strikes from concealment with devastating opening attacks. High burst damage.

name: Artillery
description: Deals heavy damage at range but vulnerable in melee. Stays behind the front line.

name: Brute
description: High damage, tough, but slow or predictable. Frontline powerhouse.

name: Controller
description: Manipulates the battlefield with conditions and forced movement.

name: Defender
description: Tanky front-liner that protects allies and controls space.

name: Harrier
description: Fast, mobile striker that darts in and out of combat.

name: Hexer
description: Debuffer and condition specialist, often with ranged or magical abilities.

name: Mount
description: Designed to carry a rider, granting enhanced mobility and synergy bonuses.

name: Support
description: Heals, buffs, or repositions allies rather than dealing direct damage.
